requirement_topic.en: Connector Direction — IEC Type 2 / CCS2 vs China GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口方向——IEC Type 2 / CCS2与中国GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口方向——IEC Type 2 / CCS2與中國GB/T

summary.en: No Eritrea-specific EV connector regulation was confirmed. For any internationally supplied, IEC-aligned charger deployment, the prudent connector direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging, consistent with 50 Hz IEC markets rather than Americas J1772 / CCS1 infrastructure. Connector choice should be written into the project specification because Eritrea's EV market is essentially non-existent and future vehicle imports may determine practical interoperability.
summary.zh: 未能确认厄立特里亚存在专门的电动汽车接口法规。对于任何国际供应、IEC体系部署的充电项目，审慎的接口方向是交流采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流采用CCS2，符合50 Hz IEC市场路径，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1基础设施。由于厄立特里亚电动汽车市场基本尚不存在，未来进口车辆类型可能决定实际互操作性，因此接口选择应写入项目规范。
summary.zht: 未能確認厄利垂亞存在專門的電動汽車接口法規。對於任何國際供應、IEC體系部署的充電項目，審慎的接口方向是交流採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流採用CCS2，符合50 Hz IEC市場路徑，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1基礎設施。由於厄利垂亞電動汽車市場基本尚不存在，未來進口車輛類型可能決定實際互操作性，因此接口選擇應寫入項目規範。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC vehicle couplers, including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS2 configuration FF

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and IEC Type 2 are not interchangeable because connector gender, contact arrangement, and signaling differ. GB/T DC and CCS2 are physically different and use different communication assumptions, with GB/T 27930 CAN communication on the China side. China-side GB/T 20234 hardware is therefore not accepted as an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 substitute.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2不能互换，因为接口性别、触点排列和信号方式不同。GB/T直流接口与CCS2物理结构不同，并采用不同通信假设，中国侧为GB/T 27930 CAN通信。因此，中国侧GB/T 20234硬件不能作为IEC Type 2 / CCS2替代品。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2不能互換，因為接口性別、觸點排列和信號方式不同。GB/T直流接口與CCS2物理結構不同，並採用不同通訊假設，中國側為GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。因此，中國側GB/T 20234硬體不能作為IEC Type 2 / CCS2替代品。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 Eritrea project. Required actions include coupler and cable redesign, locking and thermal validation, PP/CP signaling for Type 2, CCS2 DC communication stack validation where applicable, IEC 62196 test evidence, labels, spare parts, and vehicle-fleet confirmation. Do not propose Americas J1772 / CCS1 unless the project vehicle fleet explicitly requires it.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于IEC Type 2 / CCS2厄立特里亚项目。所需行动包括耦合器和电缆重新设计、锁止和温升验证、Type 2的PP/CP信号、适用时CCS2直流通信栈验证、IEC 62196测试证据、标签、备件和车辆车队确认。除非项目车辆明确要求，否则不应提出美洲J1772 / CCS1方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於IEC Type 2 / CCS2厄利垂亞項目。所需行動包括耦合器和電纜重新設計、鎖止和溫升驗證、Type 2的PP/CP信號、適用時CCS2直流通訊棧驗證、IEC 62196測試證據、標籤、備件和車輛車隊確認。除非項目車輛明確要求，否則不應提出美洲J1772 / CCS1方案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — IEC Type 2 / CCS2 is the prudent IEC-market direction where specified by the project, vehicle fleet, donor, or operator; no confirmed Eritrea national EV connector mandate identified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the China domestic connector baseline and is physically incompatible with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployments

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Eritrea, specify IEC Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC unless the actual fleet demands another connector. China GB/T connectors are not a plug-compatible substitute and require hardware, signaling, communication, labelling, and test-evidence redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对厄立特里亚项目，应指定交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2，除非实际车辆车队要求其他接口。中国GB/T接口不是可插拔替代品，需要硬件、信号、通信、标签和测试证据重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對厄利垂亞項目，應指定交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2，除非實際車輛車隊要求其他接口。中國GB/T接口不是可插拔替代品，需要硬體、信號、通訊、標籤和測試證據重新設計。
